On.Send: AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death 0 1.000000 AsTimeScale
AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death 0 3.000000 AsTimeScale

On.Terms: AnimDone.*.Complete; AnimName Birth; AnimPlaying Birth Birth
AnimDone.*.Complete; AnimName Death; AnimPlaying Death Death
AnimDone.*.Complete; AnimName Birth; AnimPlaying Birth Birth
